resume_string:
Shubham Sarkar
36/F Sitalatala Lane, Kolkata, 700011
(cid:131) +91 8240044652 # shubhamsarkarthe1@gmail.com (cid:239) shubham-sarkar-57438b27a § github.com/SSarkar-1 —
leetcode.com/shubhamsarkar243
Education
Jadavpur University, Kolkata Nov 2023 – Dec 2027
Bachelor of Technology CGPA: 7.5
Hariyana Vidya Mandir, Kolkata Apr 2020 – Apr 2022
Higher Secondary Percentage: 90%
Experience
Alignerr Jan 2026 – Present
Machine Learning Engineer Remote
• Improved LLM evaluation precision by 15% by reviewing rubric-based scoring framework across 6 reasoning categories.
• Analysed 50+ audio files for ingestion into ASR pipelines.
• Evaluated AI agent responses finding points of failure like Inference memory, Self Coherence and rubric evaluation
improving model accuracy by 20%
Jadavpur University CMATER Lab May 2025 – September 2025
Deep Learning Research Assistant Kolkata, India
• Designed and implemented a self-attention mechanism (scaled dot-product) within a pre-trained VGG16, enhancing
feature extraction for lung cancer detection from CT scans.
• Built a hybrid deep learning architecture achieving 99.54% peak accuracy with only 76k trainable parameters and 0.0256
GFLOPs, enabling edge-device deployment.
• Engineered feature fusion via concatenation and element-wise multiplication of original and attention-modulated maps
for refined, context-aware representations.
Projects
TailorCV.ai | Python, FastAPI, LLM, AI agents, Amazon Web Services 2 January 2026
• Built an AI web app optimizing resumes to job descriptions using LLMs, NLP pipelines and backend logic improving
resume relevance by up to 80%. Website
• Designed a Python and FastAPI backend with HTML, CSS and JavaScript for frontend, dockerized it and deployed on
AWS ECS.
• Got 50+ users within the first week of launch, demonstrating strong early adoption and real-world impact.
Youtube Sentiment Analysis | TensorFlow, NLP,AWS EC2, Scikit-learn 2 October 2025
• Created an end-to-end YouTube sentiment analysis pipeline processing 10k+ user comments, improving sentiment
classification performance through NLP preprocessing (tokenization, lemmatization, stopword removal. Demo
• Tracked multiple model experiments using MLflow and DVC, enabling reproducible training and systematic comparison
of models built with scikit-learn and NLP libraries.
• Deployed the pipeline on AWS using Docker and exposed predictions via Flask REST APIs, enabling scalable and
reproducible inference.
Smart Product Pricing | Keras , Hugging Face Transformers, ResNet50, OpenCV 2 October 2025
• Created a NLP and CV pipeline to analyze 150,000 image and text data using transformer-based text encoders and
CNN-based image embeddings, integrating them through a fusion neural network for price prediction
• Implemented data preprocessing, including text cleaning, tokenization, and streaming image feature extraction with
ResNet and CLIP representations to handle large dataset.
• Built and fine-tuned models using TensorFlow, and scikit-learn, accomplished 142 rank out of 50,000 participants.
Technical Skills
Machine Learning AI:Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing(NLP), Computer Vision, LLM Fine Tuning, RAG
Frameworks Libraries: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Hugging Face, Pandas, NumPy,Langchain, Flask, FastAPI
MLOps Deployment:Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, MLflow, DVC, Flask, Streamlit, CI/CD
Data Systems: PostgreSQL, SQL, ETL Pipelines, Linux, Vector Databases(Chroma)
Programming Python,C, Javascript,HTML,CSS,Data Structures and Algorithms
Leadership / Extracurricular
Entrepreneurship Cell May 2024 – Present
Core Member Jadavpur University
• Organized national-level events such as E-Summit 2025 ,Hult Prize 2025, with 5,000+ registrations and 1,000+ attendees
• Contributed to the establishment of an Incubation Center at Jadavpur University under the Institution’s Innovation
Council (IIC)
